# Support

Need help with OpenLatch security tools? Here's where to go:

| Channel | Use for | Link |
| ------- | ------- | ---- |
| **Documentation** | Architecture, tool authoring, deploy guide | [docs.openlatch.ai](https://docs.openlatch.ai) |
| **Slack** | Real-time help from the community and team | [openlatch.slack.com](https://openlatch.slack.com) |
| **GitHub Discussions** | Q&A, ideas, and show-and-tell | [Discussions](https://github.com/OpenLatch/openlatch-sectools/discussions) |
| **GitHub Issues** | Bug reports and feature requests only | [Issues](https://github.com/OpenLatch/openlatch-sectools/issues) |
| **Security** | Vulnerability reports (private) | [Security Policy](../SECURITY.md) |

Please **do not** use GitHub Issues for general questions — use Discussions or Slack instead.
